title: Convert a DTO into a command with TryFrom
scenario: A raw DTO can be missing required fields. TryFrom gives the adapter a standard fallible conversion into the application command.
instructions: Implement TryFrom<RegisterUserDto> for RegisterUserCommand using RegisterUserValidationError for missing fields.

hints.body: Keep the Converting DTOs into domain commands code active and implement TryFrom<RegisterUserDto> for RegisterUserCommand using RegisterUserValidationError for missing fields.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Convert a DTO into a command with TryFrom is shown below.

completionExplanation: Convert a DTO into a command with TryFrom now extends the active Converting DTOs into domain commands code with dto tryfrom validation. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
